bme280_init.tooltip: Initialize the BME280 temperature, humidity and air pressure sensor and return whether it is successful.

bme280_get_temperature.tooltip: Read the current temperature value, unit: degrees Celsius

bme280_get_pressure.tooltip: Read the current air pressure value, unit: Pascal

bme280_get_humidity.tooltip: Read the current humidity value, unit: percentage

bme280_calc_altitude.message0: Sensor %1 calculates altitude (m) based on air pressure %2
bme280_calc_altitude.tooltip: Calculate the altitude based on the air pressure value, unit: meters
